description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with a rounded top and a metallic gold exterior. The front features a prominent black lever, likely used to lower bread into the toaster, and two wide slots on the top for inserting slices of bread. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, with the back showing no visible controls or openings. The interior of the toast slots is metallic, with visible heating elements and guides for holding bread. The toaster stands on four short black feet, elevating it slightly above the surface. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with a focus on functionality and ease of use.
description: A gold, rounded toaster with two wide top slots and a black lever on the front, standing on four short feet. Its design is sleek and modern, with metallic interior details visible in the slots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold body, two wide toast slots, and the absence of controls or levers.
description_view_1: Top view highlighting the two parallel toast slots and the curved, smooth gold surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black lever protruding from the center and the two toast slots above.
description_view_3: Back view with a smooth gold surface and the toast slots visible on top, no controls or levers present.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular slots on top, evenly spaced, with metallic interior guides visible.
